rationale: Educ. Code §13.105 governs creation of new school districts by commissioners courts. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, appraisal values, or Tax Code §11.13(b), so the proposed change does not conflict.
quote: Sec. 13.105. CREATION OF DISTRICT. (a) If all the requirements of this subchapter are met, the commissioners court shall enter an order creating the new school district.
_note: No relevant connection between this statute and the proposed homestead exemption increase.
